creator: issyl0@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Marking this PR as suspended: 
- The www -> lists issue is no longer present as lists.freebsd.org now 
works again. 
- Many people have said that we do not change release notes after a 
release, and a lot of the release note changes in the patch refer to 
unsupported releases of FreeBSD.
